style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: [Outro] 清晨的光 代替了霓虹 / 冷茶中 一片鲜嫩的绿茶叶 在发光
music_sync.emotion_curve: peaceful → bittersweet smile → mysterious hint → fadeout

atmosphere.overall_mood: 晨光穿过百叶窗替代了霓虹——同一间出租屋但一切不同了，释然微笑，冷茶中一片鲜嫩发光的绿茶叶暗示穿越并非只是梦
atmosphere.lighting: 温暖的清晨阳光穿过百叶窗形成光条

video_prompt: Warm morning light replacing neon in the same Hong Kong apartment, peaceful awakening, a gentle smile at the completed work on screen, then close-up of a fresh glowing green tea leaf in the cold tea cup - the crossing was real, Wong Kar-wai warm epilogue, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 尾声——安静温暖的钢琴独奏+轻微弦乐
bgm.instruments: 钢琴独奏、大提琴长音、轻微的中国竹笛

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 同一间港风出租屋——但霓虹灯已灭，温暖的清晨阳光穿过百叶窗在墙上投下金色光条

transition.description: 从SEG09俯冲直接切入晨光房间

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 同一个空间，全新的光线——晨光取代霓虹
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 鸟鸣声、清晨安静的城市底噪
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: The same cramped Hong Kong apartment from the beginning but now bathed in warm golden morning sunlight streaming through venetian blinds creating parallel light bars on the wall, neon signs outside dark and off, a completely different atmosphere of peace and new beginnings, Wong Kar-wai warm morning light, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角坐在同一台CRT电脑前——姿势与SEG01相似，但不再疲惫，身上披着晨光
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 回到起点但一切不同——人变了
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Medium shot of the same man in vintage suit sitting at the same CRT computer desk, but now in warm golden morning light instead of neon, his posture relaxed and at peace unlike the hunched exhaustion of the beginning, sunlight bars on his shoulders, same room but transformed by morning light, Wong Kar-wai warm callback, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: CRT屏幕特写——上面显示一个完成的作品页面标题'茶山奇遇记'，光标静静闪烁
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 作品完成了——一切冒险凝聚成屏幕上的成果
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a CRT monitor screen showing a completed document or application titled 'Tea Mountain Adventures' in Chinese characters, the cursor blinking peacefully at the bottom, green text on black screen, the creative work is done, warm morning light reflecting subtly on the screen glass, Wong Kar-wai detail shot, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角看着屏幕——嘴角微微上扬，露出一个释然的、如释重负的微笑
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 微笑——经历了一切之后的满足
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up portrait of the man looking at his CRT screen with a gentle relieved smile, warm golden morning light on his face, the burden lifted, contentment after a long journey, subtle emotion in the slight upturn of lips, Wong Kar-wai intimate warm portrait, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角低头看向桌上的那杯冷茶——与SEG02中同一杯，但现在浸在晨光中
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 目光落在茶杯上——某种直觉
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Shot of the man looking down at the cup of cold tea on his desk, warm morning light illuminating the tea surface, his face partially visible above, curiosity in his expression, the same cup from earlier now in golden light instead of neon, Wong Kar-wai warm callback moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 茶杯特写——冷茶表面，一片鲜嫩的绿色茶叶漂浮其中，茶叶发出微弱但真实的青绿色荧光
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 穿越的证据——发光的茶叶证明一切并非只是梦
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up top-down shot of a cup of cold tea with a single fresh vibrant green tea leaf floating on the surface, the tea leaf emitting a subtle but unmistakable cyan-green bioluminescent glow, warm morning light surrounding the cup, the magical leaf proving the crossing was real, intimate magical detail, Wong Kar-wai meets subtle fantasy, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角拿起茶杯——对着那片发光的茶叶，露出了然的微笑，轻轻吹了口气

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 端起茶杯，对着茶叶微笑吹气

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 他知道了——穿越是真的，但他选择微笑不语
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of the man holding the tea cup near his lips, gently blowing on the glowing tea leaf with a knowing smile, the leaf's cyan-green glow reflecting softly on his chin, the expression of someone who knows a secret, warm morning light, intimate and mysterious, Wong Kar-wai warm enigmatic moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 远景——主角站起来走向窗边，推开百叶窗，晨光完全灌入，他的轮廓在晨光中如金色剪影

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 站起走向窗边推开百叶窗

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 面向新的一天——窗外不再是霓虹而是晨光
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 百叶窗打开声、街道晨间声响
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Medium shot of the man rising and walking to the window, pushing open the venetian blinds to let full morning sunlight flood in, his silhouette glowing golden against the bright window, a posture of hope and new beginning, the same window that once showed neon now showing warm daylight, Wong Kar-wai warm silhouette epilogue, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: CRT屏幕上'茶山奇遇记'标题渐渐淡出——取而代之的是MV歌名'凡人歌'和X-WOW Logo，一切缓缓归于黑屏
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 尾声——故事结束，传奇留在那杯茶中
storyboard_9grid.sfx: CRT轻微关机声、最后一声钢琴音淡去
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a CRT monitor screen where the 'Tea Mountain Adventures' title gently fades and is replaced by the MV title 'Song of Ordinary People' and the X-WOW logo in clean text, the screen then slowly dimming to black, the final frame of the story, warm ambient light fading, Wong Kar-wai gentle ending, film grain, fade to black, 16:9 aspect ratio
